text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond scores a brilliant victory. And
yet, she doesn't look very happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her legs got tired toward the end of the race and
she wasn't able to run her best. She leaves the
race discouraged that her performance wasn't
becoming of an illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She didn't have enough energy for the race
because she had to run to the racecourse after we
got stuck in traffic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond suspects everything was due to
her family jinx.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she picks herself up and declares her intent
to break her family's jinx at the upcoming
Japanese Derby.
